The SIG has 14 core members and maintains 10 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-message-middleware SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-message-middleware SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at message-middleware@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-message-middleware SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-message-middleware SIG maintains 10 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-message-middleware.

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-message-middleware SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: huzongtang, jianghaiting, dingwei. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
